title: delphinium virescens var. camporum
intro: Delphinium virescens var. camporum, also known as the green delphinium or green larkspur, is a plant species in the buttercup family that is native to the eastern United States. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, and is also used to treat wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make tinctures, teas, and salves, which can be applied topically or consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
